proved: Settings includes a collapsed optional remote-model section for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and xAI.
Each provider uses a masked uncontrolled input, status/set/delete typed wrappers, explicit replace/remove actions, and presence-only readback.
The input field is cleared before awaiting the OS-vault write, and the component contains no Zustand, localStorage, console, or generation import.
Saving a credential has no authority to invoke a model or transmit research.
The production frontend compiles with theme-token styles and responsive narrow-layout behavior.
The browser-only visual preview renders a neutral installed-app status and does not misreport the absent desktop vault as four credential failures.
The rendered paper-theme modal exposes four named password fields, and both the default and 600-pixel browser viewports have no horizontal overflow; narrow rows wrap the input and action cleanly.
The compiled MCP reports settings-vault-ui while retaining exactly twelve tools and no provider credential or generation tool.
notProved: A real key can be entered, replaced, and deleted in the packaged GUI on every supported operating system.
The transient DOM value and JavaScript string are absent from heap snapshots, crash artifacts, browser credential managers, or accessibility tooling.
A stored key is valid or can complete a live provider call.
Provider model discovery, default model selection, task routing, streaming, tools, billing, or adversarial orchestration.
The Settings layout has passed keyboard-only, screen-reader, high-contrast, and all-theme review.
